targets.query:
from(bucket: "robot-telemetry")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system_metrics")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "cpu_temp_c")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean)

from(bucket: "robot-telemetry")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system_metrics")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "cpu_usage_pct")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean)

from(bucket: "robot-telemetry")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system_metrics")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "ram_used_mb")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean)

from(bucket: "robot-telemetry")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "production")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "eggs_processed")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "robot-telemetry")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "production")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "throughput_per_min")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "robot-telemetry")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ethercat")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "cycle_jitter_us")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: max)

from(bucket: "robot-telemetry")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "joint_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "torque_nm")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean)

from(bucket: "robot-telemetry")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "joint_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "position_deg")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean)

from(bucket: "robot-telemetry")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "spectroscopy")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "confidence")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean)

from(bucket: "robot-telemetry")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "spectroscopy")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "calibration_drift_pct")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean)
